local.note.qwen3.6-35b-a3b: MoE with ~3B active params → fast decoding, quality close to a large model. Multimodal + agentic coding.
local.storageSuggest: C: is low on space — consider {drive}: ({gb}GB free)
local.desktopOnly: Local models are only available in the desktop app.
notif.replyComplete.title: AI reply ready
notif.permission.title: Approval required
notif.permission.body: The AI wants to run “{tool}” and is waiting for your approval
notif.permission.bodyGeneric: The AI wants to run a sensitive action and is waiting for your approval
notif.question.title: Your input is needed
sidebar.autoCreated: Created automatically when you start chatting
ctx.confirmDeleteProject: Delete project “{name}” and all its chats? This cannot be undone.
ctx.confirmDeleteConversation: Delete chat “{name}”? This cannot be undone.
workdir.needDesktop: Selecting a folder requires the desktop app (Electron)
settings.title: Settings
local.desc: Run open models (e.g. Qwen3.6) locally on this device — no network or API key required; once ready it is added to your model list and set as the default.
local.insufficient: Not enough memory (needs at least {gb}GB: unified memory on Mac / discrete-GPU VRAM). Can't run a local model — even the smallest quant (UD-Q2) won't fit. Please use a cloud model instead.
local.useCudaHint: — faster; first run downloads ~300MB CUDA runtime
local.startHint: First launch downloads the model files; this can take a while.
local.visionHint: Downloads ~1GB extra and stays in memory; turn off to save memory.
local.step1Hint: Downloads the matching inference runtime for your platform (a few hundred MB, one-time); skipped if already installed.
local.noGpu: No usable GPU detected — will run on CPU (slower).
local.offloadPartial: {n}/{layers} layers on GPU, rest on CPU (partial offload)
notify.desc: Manage when system notifications appear and their alert sounds.
notify.roundCompleteDesc: Notify when the AI finishes a task
notify.question: Question notifications
notify.questionDesc: Notify when input is needed to continue
notify.masterDesc: When off, all notifications fall back to the system default sound.
notify.unsupported: Not running in the desktop app — system notifications and sounds are unavailable.
models.desc: Manage your list of selectable models (official catalog + custom) and pick a default. The home page and chat use it to send.
models.empty: No models yet — add one from the catalog or a custom endpoint.
models.urlHint: Enter the base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API service, without a trailing “/”. This path is appended automatically:
models.urlHintFull: Full URL mode: your address is used verbatim, with no path appended.
models.apiKeyExists: Key already set for this provider — leave blank to keep it
models.officialError: Failed to load official models (make sure you're signed in)
models.officialNote: Official models go through the platform and use the official key from “API keys”.Usage is billed to your platform account.
keys.desc: Set API keys for the providers / custom models of your added models. Keys stay on this device.
keys.empty: Add a model under “Models” first, then configure its key here.
keys.officialDesc: Used by official models, issued by your platform account. Regenerating invalidates the old key immediately.Requests to official direct models will use this key.
keys.officialEmpty: No official key yet — click “Generate key” to create one.
keys.officialError: Failed to load (make sure you're signed in)
keys.regenConfirm: Regenerating will immediately invalidate the current official key. Continue?
account.upgradeDesc: Upgrade for more usage and a smoother experience
account.privacyDesc: When on, your chat interactions (including code snippets and AI output) won't be used for analytics, product improvement, or model training.
general.storageDesc: Conversations/projects are stored per-project under this directory (index.json + conversations/); you can customize the directory.
general.migrateNote: . Changing the location migrates existing records.
general.unsupported: The browser uses local storage (localStorage); custom file paths aren't supported here — use the desktop app.
general.appConfigDesc: Open app.config in your system's default editor — the on-disk file holding model, key, and run-parameter settings. Restart the app after editing manually.
about.title: About Zeraix
about.desc: AI agent workspace for your desktop.
about.unsupported: Automatic updates are only available in the installed desktop app.
about.githubDesc: Source code, releases and issue tracker.
params.title: Run parameters
params.desc: Control tool-call rounds and loop guards. Changes save immediately and are written to app.config (next to the executable).
params.maxToolRoundsHint: Max consecutive tool calls within a single turn.
params.maxSameToolCallsHint: Stop when the same tool+arguments call repeats this many times (no progress).
params.maxConsecutiveTimeoutsHint: Stop the turn after this many consecutive command timeouts (often GUI / long-running programs).
params.maxSubagentRoundsHint: Max consecutive tool calls a single sub-agent may make.
params.guardNote: 'Max repeated calls / Max consecutive timeouts' auto-stop the turn when the model keeps retrying failing or timed-out commands, avoiding busy loops.
memory.desc: Manage what the assistant remembers long-term from your conversations: preferences, facts, tasks, and relationships.
memory.unavailable: Memory is only available in the desktop app.
memory.arbiterDesc: Chooses who runs memory judging: a built-in local small model (offline, no setup) or a remote model. The local model downloads in the background on first use (~500MB), then works offline.
memory.arbiter.autoDesc: Prefer the local small model; fall back to remote when it isn't ready or is busy.
memory.arbiter.localDesc: Use only the built-in small model, fully offline; skips writing memory when unavailable.
memory.arbiter.remoteDesc: Use only the remote model configured below (never loads the local model).
memory.installTitle: Enable the local memory arbiter model?
memory.installDesc: Memory needs an arbiter model to decide what's worth remembering. You can install a built-in local small model (~500MB on first use, then offline with no setup).
memory.installDoneDesc: Memory arbitration will prefer the local model.
memory.speedDesc: The local model is about 500MB. Pick how to download it:
memory.speedBackgroundDesc: Limits resource use — slower, but the app stays usable.
memory.speedFullDesc: Faster, but the app may freeze and be unusable meanwhile.
memory.judgeDesc: A low-cost model, separate from the chat model, that decides whether a conversation is worth remembering.
memory.clearConfirm: Delete all memories? This cannot be undone.
wallet.title: Top up
wallet.subtitle: Add funds to your account balance.
wallet.payFailed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
wallet.secureNote: Payments are securely processed by Stripe.
wallet.awaitingHint: Complete the payment in your browser — this page updates automatically.
wallet.successBody: {amount} has been added to your balance.
wallet.failedBody: Nothing was charged. You can retry the payment.
wallet.stalledBody: This is taking longer than usual. Your balance updates automatically once the payment is confirmed.
wallet.retryFailed: Could not create a new payment link. Please try again.
files.title: File
terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.unavailable: Terminal is only available in the desktop app
ml.desktopOnly: Local models are only available in the desktop app.
ml.insufficient: Not enough memory on this machine (need at least {gb}GB: Mac unified memory / discrete GPU VRAM) to run local models. Use a cloud model instead.
ml.notInstalled: Not installed yet — required before running local models (~tens of MB)
ml.migrateBusyTip: Stop the model and wait for downloads to finish first
ml.noModels: No recommended models fit this machine.
ml.deleteRunningTitle: Can't delete while running — stop it first
sbx.updatable: A new runtime version is available
sbx.bootReady: Sandbox ready — daily-mode commands run in the isolated environment
sbx.failDesc: Fell back to running commands directly on the host; you can keep using it.
sbx.desc: Daily-mode commands run in an isolated, secure sandbox; the first run downloads the runtime once.
sbx.stoppedDesc: The runtime exited; commands run on this machine for now. You can restart the sandbox.
sbx.title.sandbox: Daily-mode commands run in an isolated, secure sandbox
sbx.title.ready: Dev-mode commands run directly on the host (sandbox ready; switch back to daily mode to use it)
sbx.title.error: Sandbox init failed; commands run on the host: {reason}
sbx.title.pulling: Downloading the sandbox image; daily mode switches to the sandbox when done; meanwhile commands run on the host
sbx.title.starting: Sandbox is initializing; daily mode switches to it when ready; meanwhile commands run on the host
sbx.title.unsupported: This machine doesn't support the sandbox; commands run on the host
lm.notStartedTip: Local model not started — click to open Model Library and start it
lm.notStartedDesc: The selected model is a local one ({label}), but the inference service isn't running — start it in Model Library (needs a manual start once after an app restart).
lm.chipNoModel: No model selected (add one in Settings)
local.note.gemma4-26b-a4b: MoE, ~4B active → fast decode, high quality. Multimodal (image only, no audio).
local.note.gemma4-e4b: ~4.5B effective params. Native tool-calling, QAT 4-bit near bf16. Multimodal (image/audio).
ml.pageDesc: Run open-source models on this machine: install the runtime, then download, manage and run recommended models (at most one at a time).
ml.browseHint: Models come from the Hugging Face community. Compatibility and memory fit are estimates — very new architectures may need a runtime update.
ml.gated: License acceptance required on Hugging Face
ml.noQuants: No GGUF quantizations found in this repo
ml.chatTemplateHint: Only change this if the model fails to start with a template error.
ml.ctxTooSmall: This model's context window is below {min} and is not supported.
ml.chatTemplateFile: This repo ships {file}, which will be used instead.
ml.noInstalled: No installed models yet — download one from Recommended.
auth.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the
auth.errInvalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
auth.errIncompleteCode: Please enter the complete verification code
auth.errNoAccount: Please enter your phone number or email
auth.errAgree: Please agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again
auth.googleDesktopOnly: Google sign-in is only available in the desktop app
auth.loginRequiredDesc: Sign in to top up, add official models, and generate API keys.
chat.title: Zeraix Chat
chat.localTemplateError: This model's chat template isn't compatible with the local runtime. Try a different conversion (e.g. bartowski or ggml-org), or set a chat-template override in the Model Library.
chat.localToolCallError: This model couldn't produce a valid tool call — it may be too small for agent use. Try a larger model (4B or more).
chat.devNeedWorkdir: Developer mode requires selecting a working directory (folder) first. Choose one under “⚙ Settings · Working directory” above before sending.
chat.compactMinTitle: Context usage is below 20%; too little to compress.
chat.compactTooShort: This chat is too short; there is no history to compress yet.
chat.compactDone: Context compressed; the full conversation is still kept in the view.
chat.compactNowHint: Compress the context now: collapse duplicate reads and summarize earlier history if needed. This only affects what is sent to the model; the full conversation in the view is unchanged.
chat.fileTooLarge: “{name}” exceeds 2MB; its contents were not inlined (filename only).
chat.tamperedDisabled: This conversation record has been tampered with; chat is disabled. Please delete this conversation and start over.
chat.noModel: Please add and select a model (with API Key) in Settings, or pick one from the model selector at the top of the home page.
chat.selectSkills: Select enabled skills (download more on the “Skills” page)
chat.emptyHint: Pick a provider and version, enter your key, and you’re ready to go.
chat.emptyHintTools: Try “How many drives does my computer have?” — it will run a local command to find out.
chat.compactedTip: The context sent to the model is compressed; the full conversation is still fully preserved in the view and storage, unaffected.
chat.queuedHint: · sent in order after the current reply finishes
chat.tamperBanner: This conversation’s local record has been tampered with. For your security, chat has been disabled.
chat.tamperBannerSub: Please delete this conversation’s data and start over; it will be deleted automatically in {time}.
chat.composerPlaceholder: Type a message. Enter to send / Shift+Enter for a new line (paste / drag files)
chat.tamperedPlaceholder: Conversation record tampered with; chat disabled
chat.queueTitle: Add to queue (sent in order after the current reply finishes)
chat.regenerateUp: Regenerate (keep the approach, per your “Helpful” rating)
chat.regenerateDown: Regenerate (try a different approach, per your “Not helpful” rating)
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Download and enable skills…
skills.emptyCategory: No skills in this category yet.
skills.emptyInstalled: No installed skills yet — download one from the marketplace.
skills.editDesc: Edit this skill’s Markdown (frontmatter + instructions); changes apply on save.
skills.detail.author: Author
projectSkills.prompt: Add them to the current project?
update.available.title: Update available
update.downloading.title: Downloading update
update.ready.title: Update ready
update.ready.body: Version {version} will be installed when you restart.
update.failed.title: Update failed
update.later.hint: It will be installed automatically the next time you restart Zeraix.
update.error.network: No connection. Check your network and try again.
update.error.unsigned: This build is unsigned, so it cannot update itself. Please download the latest version manually.
image.error.filtered: The provider refused this prompt. Try describing it differently.
image.error.auth: Image generation failed: the API key was rejected.
image.error.quota: Image generation failed: rate limit or quota reached.
image.error.network: Image generation failed: no connection to the provider.
image.error.unsupported: No configured provider can generate images. Add an API key for Gemini, or OpenAI.
